node.statement: N1.6 (CONCLUSION = contract: A is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra). By N1.3, (B_sa,osymm) is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra with eps_B<=C eta (universal, dimension-free). By N1.5, j is an EXACT unital order-isometric Jordan isomorphism of (A,bullet) onto (j(A),osymm) subset B_sa. Transport the def-eps-jb-algebra structure from B_sa to (A,bullet) along j (same eps<=C eta), axiom by axiom, using ||j(a)||=||a|| (order-isometric) and j(a bullet b)=j(a) osymm j(b) (N1.5): the order-unit space structure on A is EXACT (def-near-fixed-algebra: order/unit/norm inherited from B(H)_sa); commutativity and unit law of bullet are exact since osymm has them and j is an iso. JB1: ||a bullet b||=||j(a bullet b)||=||j(a) osymm j(b)||<=(1+eps_B)||j(a)||||j(b)||=(1+eps_B)||a||||b||. JB2: ||a bullet a||=||j(a) osymm j(a)||>=(1-eps_B)||j(a)||^2=(1-eps_B)||a||^2. JB4: the iso carries the osymm-associator to the bullet-associator and preserves norms, so ||((a bullet a)bullet b)bullet a-(a bullet a)bullet(b bullet a)||=||(osymm-associator at j(a),j(b))||<=eps_B||j(a)||^3||j(b)||=eps_B||a||^3||b||. JB3 (uses j ORDER embedding): from JB3 in B_sa, j(a) osymm j(a)>=-eps_B||j(a)||^2 1_B; since j(a) osymm j(a)=j(a bullet a) and 1_B=j(1_A) and ||j(a)||=||a||, this reads j(a bullet a)>=-eps_B||a||^2 j(1_A)=j(-eps_B||a||^2 1_A), i.e. j(a bullet a+eps_B||a||^2 1_A)>=0; by GT-hyp j is an ORDER embedding (z>=0 iff j(z)>=0), so a bullet a+eps_B||a||^2 1_A>=0, i.e. a bullet a>=-eps_B||a||^2 1_A. All four axioms hold on (A,bullet) with the SAME eps=eps_B<=C eta. Hence A is an O(eta)-eps-JB order-unit algebra, which is the contract (reduction to Kitaev's CP theorem for F via GT-cstar-sa-to-epsjb at N1.3).
